placements.subject: LTR - Kathleen Valley Lithium Project SPP and Institutional Placement
placements.summary:
Liontown Resources (ASX: LTR) is conducting a $150M placement and $50M SPP at $0.95 per share.
Funds will accelerate development of the Kathleen Valley lithium project in Western Australia.
The offer price represents a 7.8% discount to the 5-day VWAP of $1.03.
Macquarie Capital is acting as sole lead manager and bookrunner.
The SPP is open to eligible shareholders from 30 April to 14 May 2026.
This raise secures the remaining funding gap to first production expected in Q4 2026.
